summary: The stock has mixed signals with bullish momentum from the 12-day EMA above the 26-day EMA, but bearish momentum from MACD and negative 5-day return.
bullish_factors: The 12-day EMA is above the 26-day EMA, supporting positive momentum.
bearish_factors: MACD is below its signal line, indicating weakening momentum.
The stock has negative 5-day return momentum.
